tasks.title: Establish the local-first app shell and clean architecture baseline
tasks.goal: Create the frontend scaffold, architecture boundaries, generated roadmap seed flow, and core engineering governance.
deliverables: Generated roadmap seed pipeline from roadmap.md
acceptanceCriteria: The app starts with the generated roadmap data available
Folder layout matches domain, application, infrastructure, presentation, and app layers
Rules and architecture docs are checked into the repository

tasks.title: Implement weekly planning, session logging, and checkpoint capture
tasks.goal: Make the weekly schedule actionable by allowing session logs, delivery status, blockers, and next actions to be recorded locally.
acceptanceCriteria: A user can select a roadmap week and log multiple sessions
A user can save and revisit checkpoint data for a week
Weekly progress metrics update from persisted local data

tasks.title: Build reporting, pacing alerts, and export flows
tasks.goal: Turn raw weekly activity into a reportable artifact that shows pace, outcomes, blockers, and next steps.
acceptanceCriteria: The app computes planned versus actual hours for a week
The app shows a risk or pace alert when progress falls behind
The user can export a weekly Markdown report

tasks.title: Track project lanes and align them with the learning roadmap
tasks.goal: Keep long-horizon project execution visible without overwhelming the weekly study workflow.
deliverables: Project lane board for SIMShield and CerviCare
Clear separation between weekly execution and strategic project planning
acceptanceCriteria: Status and notes can be updated independently of weekly sessions
The dashboard keeps project work secondary to the current-week schedule

tasks.title: Harden the app for routine use and desktop packaging readiness
tasks.goal: Prepare the codebase for daily use, future Tauri packaging, and higher delivery confidence.
deliverables: Storage migration strategy if data shape changes
Packaging notes for future Windows desktop wrapping
acceptanceCriteria: Core summary and date logic are covered by tests
User data survives app restarts in the browser environment
Packaging constraints and follow-up work are documented
